name: Dark PDF Studio
description: Convert PDFs, document files, or images into dark-background reading PDFs with a compact local input-to-output workflow.
audience: Mac users who want high-contrast reading copies of local documents
Students and researchers converting PDFs, docs, or images for dark-mode review
Builders maintaining a small deterministic document export utility
detail_lines: Keeps conversion centered on one selected input file, one dark theme, one local output path, and clear open or reveal actions.
Supports PDFs first, with document and image normalization handled through explicit local backends.
Fails with clear dependency guidance when a converter is missing instead of pretending an export succeeded.
